<?php namespace Mews\Purifier\Casts; use Illuminate\Contracts\Database\Eloquent\CastsAttributes; class CleanHtmlOutput implements CastsAttributes { use WithConfig; /** * Clean the HTML when casting the given value. * * @param \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model $model * @param string $key * @param mixed $value * @param array $attributes * @return array */ public function get($model, $key, $value, $attributes) { return clean($value, $this->config); } /** * Prepare the given value for storage. Does not clean the HTML. * * @param \Illuminate\Database\Eloquent\Model $model * @param string $key * @param array $value * @param array $attributes * @return string */ public function set($model, $key, $value, $attributes) { return $value; } }
